name: NPC (brief image)
entries: A scarred mercenary carrying an old debt
A soft-spoken healer who asks too many questions
A young scout eager to prove themselves
A grizzled smuggler with a hidden cargo
A grieving elder guarding a secret
A zealous priest certain of their cause
A cunning trader who never loses a bargain
A wounded stranger fleeing something unseen
A proud hunter bound by a broken vow
A quiet child who sees more than they say
A wandering bard collecting dangerous truths
